query:
SELECT 
  r.id as room_id,
  r.room_number,
  r.property_id,
  r.template_id,
  t.name as template_name,
  q.qr_code_id,
  q.access_type,
  q.status as qr_status
FROM peppr_rooms r
LEFT JOIN peppr_service_templates t ON r.template_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN peppr_qr_codes q ON q.room_id = r.id
WHERE r.template_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.property_id, r.room_number
LIMIT 20;
